description: Use the existing semantic/embedding index (build_search_index / search_aims_semantic) to report pairs/clusters of aims above a similarity threshold (e.g. >0.92) as merge candidates. Read-only, so zero risk. Known true positive to validate against: 2a9e3aba and f592b156 are byte-identical. Output should be a ranked list of candidate pairs with similarity score so a human (or the merge tool) can act on them.

status.comment: search_aims_semantic and build_search_index now wired to MCP. Dedicated duplicate-pair report not yet implemented — can now be built on top of these tools.
